creator: antumdeluge@gmail.com
text:
Does "portsnap fetch update" pull from HEAD? Because my system still shows graphics/wxsvg at version 1.4.2.

[console]
$ sudo portsnap fetch update
Password:
Looking up portsnap.FreeBSD.org mirrors... 7 mirrors found.
Fetching snapshot tag from isc.portsnap.freebsd.org... done.
Fetching snapshot metadata... done.
Updating from Sat Aug  9 13:46:54 PDT 2014 to Sat Aug  9 16:22:29 PDT 2014.
Fetching 4 metadata patches... done.
Applying metadata patches... done.
Fetching 0 metadata files... done.
Fetching 8 patches. 
(8/8) 100.00%  done.                             
done.
Applying patches... 
done.
Fetching 0 new ports or files... done.
Removing old files and directories... done.
Extracting new files:
/usr/ports/editors/vile/
/usr/ports/editors/xvile/
/usr/ports/lang/rexx-regina/
/usr/ports/mail/notmuch/
/usr/ports/multimedia/gstreamer-plugins-ugly/
/usr/ports/net/isc-dhcp41-server/
/usr/ports/shells/lshell/
/usr/ports/www/apache24/
Building new INDEX files... done.
$ make quicksearch name=wxsvg
Port:	wxsvg-1.4.2
Path:	/usr/ports/graphics/wxsvg
Info:	C++ library to create, manipulate, and render SVG files
[/console]
